When binding energy increases energy is released Binding energy (per nucleon) increases for U (undergoing fission) But binding energy (per nucleon) decreases for He (undergoing fission) (1) (1) (1) MAX 1 if not other mark scored Energy is released when the total mass decreases Mass defect calculated Conversion between u and kg Use of вҲҶнҗёнҗё=н‘җн‘җ вҲҶн‘ҡн‘ҡ Conversion between J and MeV Binding energy per nucleon calculated B. E nucleon пҝҪ = 8.5 (MeV) [to at least 2 sf] (1) (1) (1) (1) (1) (1) Allow 1.67 Г— 10 вҲ’27 kg in conversion for MP2 8.58 MeV or 8.6 MeV does not gain MP6 Example of calculation Total mass of nucleons = 28 Г— 1.00728 u + (56вҲ’28) Г— 1.00867 u = 56.4466 u О”m = 55.93494 u вҲ’ 56.4466 u = 0.51166 u О”m = 0.51166 u Г—1.66 Г— 10 вҲ’27 kg u вҲ’1 = 8.4936 Г— 10 вҲ’28 kg О”E = 8.4936 Г—10 вҲ’28 kg Г— (3.0 Г—10 m s вҲ’1 ) = 7.6442 Г— 10 вҲ’11 J вҲҶE = 7.6442Г—10 вҲ’11 J 1.60 Г— 10 вҲ’13 J MeV вҲ’1 =477.8 MeV B. E nucleon пҝҪ = 477.8 MeV пҝҪ = 8.53 MeV B.E. / nucleon for U in range (7.2 пҖў 8.0) MeV (1) (1) Example of calculation B.E/nucleon for Fe = 8.6 units B.E./nucleon for U = 7.5 units B.E./nucleon for Fe = 7.5 8.6 Г— 8.5 MeV = 7.4 MeV Total for question 20 11 Number Answer Additional Guidance Mark stars over a 6 month period Trigonometry is used to calculate the distance to the star The diameter / radius of the EarthвҖҷs orbit about the Sun must be known / measured Marks may be obtained from a suitably annotated diagram: Diagram should indicate the Earth in two positions at opposite ends of a diameter, with lines drawn heading towards a point with a relevant angle marked (1) (1) (1) [Accept вҖңchange in angleвҖқ or вҖңparallax angleвҖқ for вҖңangular displacementвҖқ] Accept diameter of the EarthвҖҷs orbit instead of reference to 6 month period [Do not accept Pythagoras] [Accept the symmetrical diagram seen in many textbooks] Small radius Or small surface area Very dense Very high (surface) temperature Low luminosity No fusion takes place (1) (1) (1) (1) (1) Accept small volume Accept very hot [Allow вҖңfluxвҖқ for вҖңintensityвҖқ]
